sources.title: TypeScript wiki: Using the Compiler API
implementation_notes: Use Program, CompilerHost, SourceFile, and TypeChecker only inside the TypeScript worker boundary.
Translate all compiler facts into RepoGrammar-owned semantic facts before returning to Rust core.

sources.title: A 10x faster TypeScript
implementation_notes: Treat TypeScript native-port API stability as a compatibility risk.
Do not claim semantic certainty when the worker API version is unsupported.

sources.title: TSConfig allowJs
implementation_notes: Support JavaScript projects through TypeScript compiler configuration where possible.
Keep JS support inside the TS/JS v0.1 language scope.
